blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 260 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
